transcript: So after months of preparation the time has come, the wait almost over for the defending champions and the new boys Samoa. Oh, my God! call is there for england if they need it ibertoi is the man who's going to release the back line this time. Malins And it goes to Crosdale and Ali Crosdale crosses the line in under three minutes England with their first try on the board You know when we talk about patience here it is here England just setting it up Looking to stretch the ball let the ball do the work and get outside. That is a big hit coming through from Lossie Filippo. OK. Let's have a listen. It's always high and it's got some force. Well, Filippo has had his troubles on and off the pitch back in New Zealand it is not a start he wanted to make here in Georgia a yellow card for the Samoan winger yeah for loop it comes in he just lines him up and you just can't go at the next straightaway referees are going to take players out for that okay it's available good work from josh bayliss mitchell eyeing things up mercer the call and mercer with the try zach mercer the england captain takes his try tally to one in this tournament and England into a commanding position ten points in ten minutes he's just a true leader as a captain lead him by example but also just setting up that platform so the bats can play off it he's been sensational so far to start against the defending champions was always going to be the toughest of tasks the bounce of the ball not favoring the me that my name's picks up that's my lens makes the most of opportunity the Saracens fly half grabs the third and we're not even a quarter of an hour into this game. So 26 minutes in and Samara at last break their bagel. Even eight, staying firm to allow Mercer to work off the base once again. Mitchell puts it into midfield and that is a wonderful cutting line from Don Morris a searing try from the Saracen centre Morris just spots the gap, it just opens up in front of him and he cuts that beautiful line he's got support all over the place man down as they were in that first half that forward pack unable to stem the tide as England drive once again Kieran Knight's only been on a matter of seconds and already he's got five points to his name and the Gloucester boy happy with his lot. Got opportunities out wide. It's Filippo and a laughed lossy Filippo breaks to Samoa and try duck. They're a man down on the field, but Samoa get their try on the board. Randall sets it through for Ibotoi. That's a well-worked, very emphatic attack set up by the replacement scrum half, finished off by the Quinn's winger great vision and I think I've been using that really well this whole game they've been looking at threading the ball through getting behind the defenders and Samara just haven't had the players in position to stop it but great work there by England Polo Mari is the try scorer Filippo gets past Dino Lam got players on either side Polo Murray Butler hanging on to where's the support it's there from Filippo it's a one-two for for Losie Filippo and Samoa enjoying the moment if not the scoreboard not working squint throw and some are as difficult debut back in this tournament for England well a delightful dozen tries for the defending champions, really highlighting their composure and their credentials for this tournament. 74-17 tells the story. England are on the march. byddwn ni'n cymryd rhan dros rhan dros rhan a gweld beth sy'n digwydd. Mae'n amlwg, mae'n rhaid i ni gwylio chwarae Cymru heddiw. Rydym ni wedi cymryd profiad gyda Cymru, ond mae'n rhaid i ni gyrraedd, cofnodi, ac rydym ni'n mynd yn ôl i hyfforddi yn gyntaf ac yn canolbwyntio ar Cymru, ond diolch i Samoa unwaith eto, mae'n wych.
